Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Коли в бою нагнітаються емоції, ви або члени вашої команди зможете активувати Теургію.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Theurgy can be activated on your turn when your Theurgy gauge is at max. Unlike normal skills, they do not cost HP or SP.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 26}Press {f 1 3 118} to activate your Theurgy. Please note that it cannot be used while you are afflicted with a status ailment.[n]{f 1 1}
